x-enumeration-literals.name: Cash Withdrawal Service
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Allows customers to withdraw cash from ATMs using their debit card.

Comment:
May include network-specific access and daily withdrawal limits.

x-enumeration-literals.name: POS Payment Service
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Enables payments directly at retail stores, restaurants, or online merchants.

Comment:
Examples
Uses PIN, signature, or digital authentication.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Online Payment Service
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Enables bill payments, peer-to-peer transfers, or e-commerce purchases via mobile apps or web banking.

Comment:
Examples:
May include real-time payments or scheduled payments.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Recurring Debit Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Automatically debits funds at predefined intervals for recurring obligations like subscriptions or loan repayments.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Funds Transfer Service
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Allows internal transfers (within the same bank) or external transfers (domestic or international).

Comment:
Can include instant transfers or batch processing.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Overdraft Debit Service
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Allows spending beyond available balance using linked overdraft or credit facilities.

Comment:
Fees and interest may apply.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Tiered Debit Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Provides enhanced features such as higher transaction limits, fee waivers, or international ATM access for premium customers.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Balance Inquiry & Account Management Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Lets customers check account balances, transaction history, or update personal information via ATM, POS, or online channels.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Alerts & Notifications Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Sends SMS, email, or app notifications for debit transactions, low balances, or overdraft activity.
